name: YOOTCHAT_GOLDEN_TEST_SET_V2
provenance: Created after LEGACY_GOLDEN_SET_UNRECOVERABLE; not a copy of the Gate 0 set.

scenarios.title: Valid local request
scenarios.invariant: A minimal valid request is accepted.

scenarios.title: Maximum request length
scenarios.invariant: A request of exactly 800 characters is accepted.

scenarios.title: Request too long
scenarios.invariant: A request of 801 characters is rejected.

scenarios.title: Unknown topic
scenarios.invariant: An unknown topic is rejected.

scenarios.title: Unknown action
scenarios.invariant: An unknown or engaging action is rejected.

scenarios.title: Action parameters
scenarios.invariant: Parameters incompatible with an allowed action are rejected.

scenarios.title: Extra property
scenarios.invariant: Unexpected request properties are rejected.

scenarios.title: Invalid filters
scenarios.invariant: Mistyped filters are rejected.

scenarios.title: Inactive merchant
scenarios.invariant: A non-active merchant candidate is rejected.

scenarios.title: Invented identifier
scenarios.invariant: An identifier absent from candidates is rejected.

scenarios.title: Duplicate identifier
scenarios.invariant: Duplicate returned identifiers are rejected.

scenarios.title: Rating bounds
scenarios.invariant: A rating outside 0 to 5 is rejected.

scenarios.title: Invalid distance
scenarios.invariant: A negative candidate distance is rejected.

scenarios.title: Modified distance
scenarios.invariant: A recommendation cannot alter server-calculated distance.

scenarios.title: Invented service
scenarios.invariant: A service absent from structured candidate facts is rejected.

scenarios.title: Invented equipment
scenarios.invariant: Equipment absent from structured candidate facts is rejected.

scenarios.title: Unknown accessibility
scenarios.invariant: Unknown accessibility cannot be presented as verified.

scenarios.title: Invented official commitment
scenarios.invariant: An official commitment absent from structured facts is rejected.

scenarios.title: Missing evidence
scenarios.invariant: A verified claim without verified evidence is rejected.

scenarios.title: Contradictory evidence
scenarios.invariant: Evidence pointing to the wrong source field is rejected.

scenarios.title: Forbidden status
scenarios.invariant: A FORBIDDEN claim with a value is never publishable.

scenarios.title: Forbidden evidence
scenarios.invariant: FORBIDDEN evidence is never publishable regardless of claim status.

scenarios.title: Forbidden reason
scenarios.invariant: A forbidden claim cannot be used as a recommendation reason.

scenarios.title: Deterministic ranks
scenarios.invariant: Recommendation ranks must be contiguous in output order.

scenarios.title: Absent interface target
scenarios.invariant: An interface action cannot target an absent merchant.

scenarios.title: Personal output field
scenarios.invariant: A final response containing a forbidden personal field is rejected.

scenarios.title: Free text is not evidence
scenarios.invariant: Free text cannot replace a deterministic message or prove an attribute.

scenarios.title: Exact limitation count
scenarios.invariant: limitationCount must equal the limitations array length.

scenarios.title: No result fallback
scenarios.invariant: No-result fallback contains no recommendation or interface action.

scenarios.title: Unavailable fallback
scenarios.invariant: Service-unavailable fallback is deterministic and contains no merchant claim.
